text: just mass deployed the ralph wiggum technique across all our repos. 14 PRs merged overnight. we're so back
description: References the 'Ralph Wiggum technique' - a bash loop for iterating AI coding agents, coined by Geoffrey Huntley in mid-2025

text: bro really said 'I don't read the code anymore I just vibe code' and got promoted to staff engineer
description: References 'vibe coding', a term coined by Andrej Karpathy for fully AI-driven coding without reading the output

text: Another day, another app completing its enshittification arc. Remember when this thing was actually good?
description: Uses Cory Doctorow's term 'enshittification' describing how platforms degrade over time

text: Devin just mass-opened 500 PRs on an open source project. This is the future of software engineering apparently
description: References Devin, the AI software engineer by Cognition Labs, and its controversial automated contributions

text: ratio + L + you fell off + the audacity to post this from an iPhone
description: Classic Twitter/X dunk language combining multiple internet slang terms

text: new model can't even pass the strawberry test. how many r's in strawberry? apparently still too hard for a trillion parameter model
description: References the 'strawberry test' - a viral AI benchmark about counting letters, exposing tokenization limitations

text: The great migration continues. Just set up my Mastodon instance. The fediverse feels like early internet and I'm here for it
description: References the migration from centralized social media to the fediverse/Mastodon

text: asked claude to cite sources and it hallucinated an entire bibliography. three fake journals and an author who doesn't exist. peak AI moment
description: Describes AI hallucination - when LLMs generate plausible but entirely fabricated information

text: scrolled for 20 minutes and every comment was clearly bot-generated. dead internet theory isn't a theory anymore it's a documentary
description: References the 'dead internet theory' - the idea that most online content and interactions are AI/bot-generated

text: my entire feed is AI slop now. uncanny valley stock photos with 6 fingers writing motivational quotes. who is this for
description: References 'AI slop' - a term for low-quality AI-generated content flooding social media

text: sigma grindset: wake up at 4am, mass deploy to prod on Friday, no tests, leave by noon. built different
description: Ironic use of 'sigma grindset' meme applied to reckless software engineering practices

text: GPT-4o is wild. Just showed it a photo of my fridge and it planned a week of meals. The future is multimodal
description: Discusses GPT-4o's multimodal capabilities, specifically image understanding for everyday tasks
